final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for UGREEN NAS (绿联私有云) brand 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: e-commerce key visual poster, bold promotional graphic design
Composition: vertical poster layout, hero product (NAS device) centered or prominently featured, 618 anniversary badge / burst element in upper or lower zone, layered depth with brand and offer copy
Subject: UGREEN NAS private cloud storage device as hero product, 618 anniversary celebration theme
Scene/backdrop: clean tech-gradient background, festive but premium atmosphere suitable for a tech brand
Lighting/mood: bright, energetic, celebratory — conveys excitement and deal urgency
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as dominant accent, paired with white and deep navy or dark background; 618 red/gold highlight for festive cue
Materials/textures: smooth gradient surfaces, subtle glowing light effects on product, clean flat areas for copy placement
Text (verbatim): 绿联私有云  618周年庆
Constraints: product must be clearly legible; text zones must be uncluttered and readable; layout must work as a vertical e-commerce banner
Avoid: cluttered layouts, generic stock-photo backgrounds, overly cartoonish style, mismatched warm-cool lighting contradictions
